version_description: Capo on 3rd, utilizes easier chords for beginners.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Arthurs Theme Best That You Can Do

content:
Ride Like The Wind by Christopher Cross

Capo 3


[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
It is the night. My body's weak,  I'm on the run. No time for sleep[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I've got to ride, Ride like the wind to be free again[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I got such a long way to go[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
To make it to the border of Mexico.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
So I'll ride...like the wind,  Ride like the wind[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I was born the son of a lawless man.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Always spoke my mind with a gun in my hand.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Lived nine lives gunned down ten.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Gonna ride like the wind.[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I got such a long way to go[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
To make it to the border of Mexico.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
So I'll ride...like the wind,  Ride like the wind[/tab]

Gonna ride like the wind.


[Break]  x2

[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Never was the kind to do as I was told.[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Gonna ride like the wind before I get old.[/tab]
